title: Basic Dark GUI
description: This is a Basic Dark GUI that stays true to the vanilla GUI style. Easy on the eyes, with soft shading and low contrast.
body: Browsing through the internet I struggled to find any Dark GUI texture packs that I really liked, so ultimately I made my ideal Dark GUI myself and decided I'd share it with you guys. The resource pack changes all containers GUIs such as player's inventory, chests, and furnaces, as well as the hotbar, the buttons in the menu, and even swaps the dirt background found throughout the menus in the game for the deepslate texture. I'm really happy with how this turned out. I hope you enjoy it!
